# Sunsynk Report Platform

> Paid Sunsynk Performance Reports for Sunsynk account holders. Turns about 30 days of plant readings into an executive overview, optional estimated savings (with a saved tariff), system health score, solar and battery analysis, and prioritised actions in a PDF. Credit bundles from GBP 2.99 / ZAR 69.99 / USD 4.29 with no subscription. One credit equals one report. Credits never expire.

Sunsynk Report Platform (sunsynkreports.com) is the marketing site for the self-serve report product. Sign-in, credits, tariffs, and report generation run at https://app.sunsynkreports.com. Copy and spelling follow British English (en-GB).

Preferred citation name: Sunsynk Report Platform. Product: Sunsynk Performance Report. Parent brand: Sunsynk.

## Primary

- [Home](https://sunsynkreports.com/): Homeowner journey covering trust, savings, health, sample compare, what is inside, prioritised actions, how it works, pricing and FAQ
- [App](https://app.sunsynkreports.com/): Sign in with Sunsynk credentials; Reports, Credits, and Settings (tariffs)

## Product facts

- [Pricing on home page](https://sunsynkreports.com/#pricing): Starter 1 credit, Classic 3 credits (Most Popular), Pro 5 credits (Best Value); GBP/ZAR/USD; credits never expire; unused credits refundable within 14 days of purchase; Stripe checkout; no subscription
- [Sample](https://sunsynkreports.com/#sample): With versus without report comparison
- [Insights](https://sunsynkreports.com/#insights): Grouped solar, battery and evening cost analysis
- [How it works](https://sunsynkreports.com/#how-it-works): Sign in, buy credits, generate a 30-day report (optional tariff for savings), preview and download

## Full context

- [llms-full.txt](https://sunsynkreports.com/llms-full.txt): Expanded site summary and page summaries for deeper model context

## Optional

- [Privacy policy](https://sunsynkreports.com/privacy-policy/): Personal data collection, use, and protection
- [Terms of use](https://sunsynkreports.com/terms-of-use/): Legal terms for platform and report use
- [Cookie policy](https://sunsynkreports.com/cookie-policy/): Cookie types, purpose, duration, and choices
- [Sitemap](https://sunsynkreports.com/sitemap.xml): Canonical URL index for crawlers
- [robots.txt](https://sunsynkreports.com/robots.txt): Crawler allowances and sitemap location
